summary: Tested Department Permissions & Context Selector for Prashnakosh V1. Fixed a critical bug where validateDepartmentAccess was not accessible in registerBlueprintRoutes due to scope issue. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). All 3 frontend tests pass (100%).

issues: Wing shows 'Not Assigned' even though HOD is assigned to departments - this may be expected if wingId is not set for HOD user

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: validateDepartmentAccess function was defined inside registerRoutes() but called from registerBlueprintRoutes() which is outside that scope. Moved function to module level.
Department filtering works correctly for questions, blueprints, and tests endpoints
Security: Users correctly denied access to departments they're not assigned to (403 response)
Admin bypass works correctly - admin can access all data without department filter
Login response correctly includes departmentIds array and activeDepartmentId
seed_data_creation: Database already seeded with: 1 school (MVMCHN), 4 classes (IX-XII), 7 subjects, 28 departments, HOD (Dr. Ram Kumar) assigned to IX_Science and X_Science, Teacher (Priya Singh) assigned to IX_Science and X_Science
context_for_next_testing_agent: Department Permissions feature is fully functional. The validateDepartmentAccess function was moved to module level to fix scope issue. All department-filtered queries work correctly. Security tests confirm users cannot access departments they're not assigned to. Frontend Department Selector works correctly - shows dropdown with assigned departments and updates welcome text when switched.

backend_tests: Test 1: HOD login includes departmentIds array and activeDepartmentId - PASSED
Test 2: Teacher login includes departmentIds array - PASSED
Test 3: GET /api/my-departments returns enriched department info (className, subjectName, role) - PASSED
Test 4: GET /api/questions?departmentId=IX_SCI_ID returns empty array (not 403) - PASSED
Test 5: GET /api/blueprints?departmentId=IX_SCI_ID returns empty array (not 403) - PASSED
Test 6: GET /api/tests?departmentId=IX_SCI_ID returns empty array (not 403) - PASSED
Test 7: SECURITY - Teacher cannot access IX_English questions (403) - PASSED
Test 8: SECURITY - HOD cannot access IX_English blueprints (403) - PASSED
Test 9: POST /api/questions without departmentId returns 400 - PASSED
Test 10: POST /api/blueprints without departmentId returns 400 - PASSED
Test 11: Admin can GET /api/questions without departmentId (admin bypass) - PASSED
frontend_tests: Test 12: Department Selector dropdown visible in header - PASSED
Test 13: Dropdown shows both 'IX - Science' and 'X - Science' options - PASSED
Test 14: Switching department updates welcome text to 'Current Department: X - Science' - PASSED

bug_fixed.issue: GET /api/blueprints?departmentId=... returned 500 error: 'validateDepartmentAccess is not defined'
bug_fixed.root_cause: validateDepartmentAccess function was defined inside registerRoutes() function scope, but registerBlueprintRoutes() is a separate function called from within registerRoutes(). The inner function couldn't access the locally scoped helper.
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Moved validateDepartmentAccess function from inside registerRoutes() to module level (before registerRoutes function definition) so it's accessible by all route registration functions.
